prestazioni: Engine: 1JZ-GTE (7M-GTE block with forged internals, 87mm bore, 91mm stroke, 2.8L displacement) – built by Tomei Powered with JUN forged pistons (9.0:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-M 264° camshaft kit for high-RPM stability. Turbocharger: Garrett GTX4202R with a 0.82 A/R turbine housing and billet compressor wheel, paired with a Tomei M82 cast manifold and custom 3.5-inch downpipe.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) with 4.10 final gear ratio in a Torsen-style differential housing, mated to a Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox (6-speed) with a Tilton twin-plate carbon clutch (7.25-inch). Custom driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch chromoly) to handle 600+ lb-ft torque.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for JZX100 chassis) with 8kg/mm front springs and 10kg/mm rear springs, reinforced with Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm) and rear upper strut brace. Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors) up front with Ferodo DS2500 pads, and 2-piston rear calipers (330mm rotors) with Hawk HT-10 pads. Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P (18x9.5 +15 front, 18x10.5 +25 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (255/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear).
estetica: Body Kit: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion (JZX100-specific, with custom carbon fiber front fenders and rear quarter panels), paired with a custom 3D-printed ABS front splitter (50mm overhang) and a Rocket Bunny GT wing (carbon fiber, 1,200mm span, adjustable angle).

Lighting: Custom Hella Micro DE projectors (bi-xenon, 5000K) with Morimoto D2S 4.0 bulbs, housed in a custom carbon fiber shroud. Rear: Depo JZX100 LED taillights with sequential turn signals and smoked lenses. Side markers: Diode Dynamics SS300 sequential LED strips.

Interior: Bride Zeta III reclinable seats (fixed-back, carbon fiber shell) with Takata 4-point harnesses, wrapped in Alcantara and custom red stitching. Custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, chromoly, bolt-in) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Dashboard: Defi BF Advance gauges (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted in a custom carbon fiber pod, with a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede) and NRG quick-release hub.
